name: Midari Ikishima
description:
A third-year student and head of the Student Council Beautification Committee. She gets pleasure from taking risks such as starting games of Russian roulette by herself.

~! As she plays a dangerous game with Yumeko while putting both of their lives on the line, she realizes taking risks is such an amazing feeling thanks to Yumeko and her past life. She lost her left eye by stabbing herself with a pen in front of the Student Council, in order to pleasure the President.!~
